q: Problem: High Clicks but Zero Conversions. Hypothesis: Landing page isn't relevant. Solution?
Problem: High CPC in a competitive niche. Hypothesis: Quality Score is low. Solution?
Problem: Ad is not showing at all. Hypothesis: Budget is too low for the auction. Solution?
Problem: High Bounce Rate on mobile. Hypothesis: Page loads too slowly. Solution?
Problem: Low CTR for a Top Position ad. Hypothesis: Ad copy is not engaging. Solution?
Problem: Search Terms Report shows junk traffic. Hypothesis: Match types are too broad. Solution?
Problem: Sales dropped after changing Bids. Hypothesis: Bids are now too low to win. Solution?
Problem: Many Add to Cart but no Purchase. Hypothesis: Checkout process is broken. Solution?
Problem: Impression Share is under 20%. Hypothesis: Budget is severely capped. Solution?
Problem: ROAS is 0.5 (Losing money). Hypothesis: CPC is higher than profit. Solution?
Problem: Ad Rank is dropping daily. Hypothesis: Competitors increased bids. Solution?
Problem: RSA shows Poor Ad Strength. Hypothesis: Not enough unique headlines. Solution?
Problem: High traffic from wrong cities. Hypothesis: Location targeting is too wide. Solution?
Problem: Brand ads are too expensive. Hypothesis: Competitors are bidding on your name. Solution?
Problem: Keywords have Low Search Volume. Hypothesis: Keywords are too specific. Solution?
Problem: Conversion tracking stopped. Hypothesis: Website tag was removed. Solution?
Problem: Campaign performs well then crashes. Hypothesis: Competitor launched a sale. Solution?
Problem: Sitelinks aren't showing. Hypothesis: Ad Rank is too low. Solution?
Problem: Clicks are coming from Apps. Hypothesis: Display Network is enabled. Solution?
Problem: High Cost but no Leads for B2B. Hypothesis: Traffic is Informational not Buyer. Solution?
Problem: Ad disapproved for Mismatched URL. Hypothesis: Display URL differs from Final URL. Solution?
Problem: Lead quality is very poor. Hypothesis: Ad copy is too clickbaity. Solution?
opts: Qualify users in the ad copy

q: Problem: CTR is high but Time-on-Page is 2s. Hypothesis: Ad click is misleading. Solution?
opts: Align ad copy with page content

q: Problem: Optimization Score is 40%. Hypothesis: Many recommendations ignored. Solution?
Problem: Remarketing list is not growing. Hypothesis: Privacy/Consent mode issue. Solution?
Problem: Auction Insights shows a new player. Hypothesis: Market entry by competitor. Solution?
Problem: No clicks on a weekend. Hypothesis: B2B audience is inactive. Solution?
Problem: Performance Max is stealing search traffic. Hypothesis: Overlapping keywords. Solution?
Problem: DSA targeting junk. Hypothesis: Website indexing is poor. Solution?
Problem: CPA is rising weekly. Hypothesis: Creative fatigue. Solution?
Problem: Search Terms show competitor names. Hypothesis: Using Broad Match. Solution?
Problem: Call Extension gets no clicks. Hypothesis: Business is closed during ad hours. Solution?
Problem: Low Top of Page rate. Hypothesis: Bids are below market average. Solution?
Problem: CPC is Rs.200 for Rs.10 product. Hypothesis: Bidding on wrong intent keywords. Solution?
Problem: Broad Match is spending too much. Hypothesis: No negative keyword guardrails. Solution?
Problem: Account suspended for Payments. Hypothesis: Credit card expired. Solution?
Problem: Sitelink CTR is 0%. Hypothesis: Sitelink text is boring. Solution?
Problem: Conversions are being double-counted. Hypothesis: Tracking tag fires twice. Solution?
Problem: Smart Bidding isn't Learning. Hypothesis: Not enough conversion data. Solution?
Problem: Landing page Not found (404). Hypothesis: URL was changed but ad wasn't. Solution?
Problem: Click volume is dropping. Hypothesis: Market search volume is seasonal. Solution?
Problem: Responsive Ads not serving. Hypothesis: Too many Pinned headlines. Solution?
opts: Unpin headlines to let AI test

q: Problem: High traffic but no leads for local biz. Hypothesis: Users are too far away. Solution?
Problem: Below First Page Bid status. Hypothesis: Bid is too low for entry. Solution?
opts: Raise bid to estimated first page

q: Problem: Search partners spending 90% budget. Hypothesis: Partners are cheap but low intent. Solution?
Problem: Script keeps failing. Hypothesis: API limit reached or syntax error. Solution?
Problem: Limited by Budget status. Hypothesis: Daily spend cap is too low. Solution?
Problem: Image extensions not showing. Hypothesis: Account doesn't meet requirements. Solution?
Problem: High CPC on Brand keywords. Hypothesis: Low Quality Score on brand. Solution?
Problem: Automated bids spending too fast. Hypothesis: No Max CPC cap on Max Clicks. Solution?
